title: The Veil Nebula in Hydrogen and Oxygen
explanation: A delicate web of glowing gas marks an expanding supernova remnant in Cygnus.

title: Aurora over the Westfjords
explanation: Green curtains of aurora ripple above an Icelandic fjord on a clear autumn night.

title: The Andromeda Galaxy Up Close
explanation: Our nearest large galactic neighbour spans the autumn sky.

title: Noctilucent Clouds at High Latitude
explanation: Electric-blue clouds glow at the edge of space over the North Atlantic.

title: A Total Lunar Eclipse over the Andes
explanation: Earth's shadow turns the Moon deep red above the mountains.

title: Sea Ice from Orbit
explanation: Satellite imagery captures the shifting ice edge in the Greenland Sea.

title: The Orion Nebula in Infrared
explanation: A stellar nursery glows in the sword of Orion.

title: Comet over the Fjord
explanation: A bright comet hangs above a quiet Icelandic harbour at dawn.

title: The Pleiades Star Cluster
explanation: Hot blue stars wrapped in reflection nebulosity.

title: Geomagnetic Storm Aurora
explanation: A strong G3 storm lights skies far south of the Arctic Circle.

title: The Heart and Soul Nebulae
explanation: Vast clouds of glowing hydrogen in Cassiopeia.

title: Earth's Limb at Sunset
explanation: The thin blue line of the atmosphere photographed from the ISS.

title: The Milky Way over the North Atlantic
explanation: The galactic core arcs above a dark ocean horizon.

title: A Solar Prominence Erupts
explanation: A loop of plasma arcs off the Sun's limb.

title: Iceland from the DSCOVR Camera
explanation: The whole sunlit disk of Earth with Iceland near the terminator.

title: The Double Cluster in Perseus
explanation: Two open star clusters shine in the autumn Milky Way.

title: Moonrise over a Trawler
explanation: A gibbous Moon rises behind a fishing vessel at sea.

title: The Helix Nebula
explanation: A dying star sheds glowing shells of gas.

title: Polar Stratospheric Clouds
explanation: Iridescent clouds shimmer over the Arctic in winter twilight.

title: The Andromeda and Triangulum Galaxies
explanation: Two spiral galaxies framed in a wide autumn field.

title: Sunspot Group AR3590
explanation: A large active region tracks across the solar disk.

title: Aurora Reflected on Calm Water
explanation: Northern lights mirrored in a still Westfjords inlet.
